# ASImportableCredential.creditCard(_:)

**Case**

A credit card credential.

## Declaration

```swift
case creditCard(ASImportableCredential.CreditCard)
```

## Identity credential types

- **ASImportableCredential.CreditCard**: A type to represent credit card information.
